title: ServiceOffer v1
description: Machine-readable schema for one standing exchange-facing service offer published by a provider-side subject. This artifact is catalog-facing and distinct from transport-facing node advertisements.

offer/id.description: Stable identifier of this standing service offer.

created-at.description: Timestamp when the offer record became auditable.

published-at.description: Timestamp when the offer was last published to the exchange-visible channel.

expires-at.description: Timestamp after which the offer should be treated as stale.

sequence/no.description: Monotonic per-offer sequence number. Higher values supersede lower ones for the same standing offer identity.

provider/participant-id.description: Provider-side accountable subject publishing this offer.

service/type.description: Marketplace-visible service category such as `text/redaction`, `research/topical`, or `image/generation`.

service/description.description: Human-readable summary of the offered service.

pricing/amount.description: Price in minor units for one billable unit of service. When `pricing/currency = ORC`, the value uses ORC minor units with fixed scale `2`.

pricing/currency.description: Settlement unit or currency symbol, with `ORC` as the current hard-MVP marketplace unit.

pricing/unit.description: Human-readable billable unit, for example `1 summary item`, `1800 input characters`, or `1 illustration`.

delivery/max-duration-sec.description: Maximum provider-side promised duration for one accepted order under this standing offer.

queue/auto-accept.description: Whether the provider declares automatic acceptance up to the published queue posture.

queue/max-depth.description: Maximum queue depth at which the provider still considers the service admissible.

queue/current-depth.description: Current queue depth when the offer was published or refreshed.

constraints/input.description: Optional input-side bounded constraints declared by the provider.

constraints/output.description: Optional output-side bounded constraints declared by the provider.

hybrid.description: Whether this service involves human intervention beyond pure automated model execution.

model-first.description: Whether model-backed processing is intended to happen before human intervention when `hybrid` is true.

confirmation/mode.description: Provider-declared preferred confirmation mode for later procurement formation.

policy_annotations.description: Optional marketplace-local or federation-local annotations that do not redefine the core standing-offer semantics.

alg.description: Signature algorithm used by the provider-side accountable subject.
